title: Express Train from Andalucía
writer: Vicente Coello, Giuseppe Mangione, Francisco Rovira Beleta
actors: Jorge Mistral, Marisa de Leza, Mara Berni
plot: The handsome Andrade, the undergraduate Miguel and a street vendor called 'El Rubio' plan to steal a shipment of jewelry traveling aboard the express train of Andalusia. But to carry out the action they are forced to kill a couple...
